T0547.title: Third-Party App Authorization
T0547.definition: Permission granted to an external application to access enterprise SaaS data, APIs, or account capabilities.
T0547.description: Third-Party App Authorization is used to identify related risks, abuse patterns, control requirements, and operational signals in BREAK business-security analysis.
T0547.usageExample: Assess Third-Party App Authorization related exposure and define the corresponding controls.
